Off Calendar Jul-14-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearance(s) on THU-JUL-14-2016:
Daniel W. Wayne, Esq. for the plaintiff / opposing party;
No other appearances.

There being no argument, the Court, adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant H.I.S. PLACE #2 LLC's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Eric Speer, Aaron Curry, And Christopher Nizers' Complaint Against Defendant H.I.S. Place 2 LLC is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged; attorney's fees and treble damages are not sought against the moving defendant; and the allegations are not irrelevant or improper. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: L. Fong; matter not reported. (501)
